trolley_key.description:
Don't carry coins becasue you're not a boomer?
Then this little dohickey is your saviour
Slap this bad boy in the coin slot of your trolley!

Picture To Come!


Colour Options:
 - Enquire about what colours are avalible

Surfaces Options:
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Textured

large_box.description:
This is the big one! 
Store all your vials in one case.

 - 54x 3ml Vials

Colour Options:
Each componet can be customized to a colour of choice.
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base

 - Textured

mixed_box.description:
Medium-sized rugged case that fits nicely into the fridge.

Holds:
 - 8x 3ml Vials
 - 6x 10ml Vials

Colour Options:
Each componet can be customized to a colour of choice.
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
